description: Windows Server fleet overview. Displays CPU, memory, disk, network, and service health for all monitored Windows hosts. Metrics sourced from Grafana Alloy via Prometheus recording rules.

panels.description: Average CPU utilization across selected Windows servers.
panels.title: CPU Utilization

panels.description: Average memory utilization across selected Windows servers.
panels.title: Memory Utilization

panels.description: Average system uptime across selected Windows servers, displayed in days.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Total count of Windows services detected as not running across selected hosts.
panels.title: Services Not Running

panels.description: CPU utilization percentage over time, broken down by hostname. Sourced from the recording rule instance:windows_cpu_utilization:ratio.
panels.title: CPU Utilization Over Time

panels.description: Breakdown of CPU time by processing mode (user, privileged, idle, interrupt, dpc). Displayed as a stacked area chart to show how CPU time is distributed.
panels.title: CPU Modes Breakdown

panels.description: Memory utilization percentage over time, broken down by hostname. Sourced from the recording rule instance:windows_memory_utilization:ratio.
panels.title: Memory Utilization Over Time

panels.description: Percentage of free disk space per volume per host. Low values indicate volumes approaching capacity. Sourced from the recording rule instance:windows_disk_free:ratio.
panels.title: Disk Free Space %

panels.description: Disk I/O utilization (proportion of time the disk is busy) per volume. High values indicate I/O saturation. Sourced from the recording rule instance:windows_disk_io_utilization:ratio.
panels.title: Disk I/O Utilization

panels.description: Disk read and write throughput per volume, calculated from the raw counter metrics windows_logical_disk_read_bytes_total and windows_logical_disk_write_bytes_total.
panels.title: Disk Read/Write Throughput

panels.description: Combined network throughput (inbound + outbound) per host. Sourced from the recording rule instance:windows_network_bytes:rate5m.
panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.description: Network traffic broken down by direction (received vs. sent) per network interface. Uses raw counter metrics for per-NIC granularity.
panels.title: Network In/Out

panels.description: Lists Windows services that are not in the 'running' state. Useful for identifying stopped critical services that may require attention.
panels.title: Windows Services Not Running

panels.description: Projected days until disk volume is full based on current growth rate over the last 7 days. Negative values indicate disk usage is decreasing. Uses predict_linear to extrapolate current trends.

targets.expr: predict_linear(windows_logical_disk_free_bytes{hostname=~"$hostname", environment=~"$environment", datacenter=~"$datacenter", role=~"$role", volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*"}[7d], 86400 * 30) / (windows_logical_disk_size_bytes{hostname=~"$hostname", environment=~"$environment", datacenter=~"$datacenter", role=~"$role", volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*"} > 0) < 0 and windows_logical_disk_free_bytes / windows_logical_disk_size_bytes < 0.3

panels.title: Disk Capacity Forecast (Days Until Full)

panels.description: Projected disk free bytes over the next 30 days based on 7-day trend. Dashed lines show the linear extrapolation from current usage patterns.
panels.title: Disk Free Bytes -- 30-Day Projection

title: Windows Server Overview
